description: Add group name s to the interfaces in the range. Use of the group logic is described in Groups . This command may take the form zone interface "slotname = groupname" — quotation marks required, spaces at equals sign ignored — where slotname is the slot assignment and groupname is the group name.

keywords.name: remove
keywords.description: Remove s from the interfaces. If a slot is not specified, the group name is removed from all slots it is found in.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Assign the group to the slot named s . The default slot name is Default .
